All pages load correctly with proper routing
Dark mode toggle functional across all pages
Mobile responsive layout working at 390px viewport
Contact form integration with /api/contact working correctly
YRVA10 discount code gives 10% off as expected

All 6 extras displayed: Extra pagina's €50, Meertalige website €200, Extra contactformulier €80, Boekingssysteem €250, Google Reviews €120, Dark mode €80

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30: Full regression test after glassmorphism styling changes to BeforeAfterSlider.jsx, WhyWebsitePage.jsx, CalculatorPage.jsx, PackagesPage.jsx, and navigation headers. All 36 tests passed. Website is ready for GitHub/Vercel deployment. Key features verified: Homepage sections, navigation dropdowns, dark mode toggle, language toggle, all 4 pricing packages, all 6 extras, calculator with YRVA10 discount code, all subpages (Diensten, Rebranding, Privacy, Over Mij, Blog, WhyWebsite, Onderhoud), mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu, contact form submission.
